name: TerraSurvive
notes: BUILD COMPLETE. 38 Swift files, 5-tab layout (Map, Guides, Species, SOS, Settings). All MVP features implemented: MapKit with region annotations and water sources, survival guide library with 15+ techniques across 6 categories, species database with 18 species across 3 regions, SOS beacon with SwiftData persistence, emergency contacts for 6 countries, 3-tier paywall (monthly/yearly/lifetime), 4-screen onboarding, offline region downloads. Architecture: @Observable services with bundled static data, SwiftData for bookmarks and SOS logs, DesignSystem used throughout. No third-party dependencies. Build requires iOS simulator SDK: swift build -Xswiftc -sdk -Xswiftc $(xcrun --sdk iphonesimulator --show-sdk-path) -Xswiftc -target -Xswiftc arm64-apple-ios17.0-simulator
